document_info.document_type: Statement of Values / Property Schedule Supplemental

business_description.nature_of_business: Commercial real estate property owner/operator with office, mercantile, mixed-use, and medical office locations

coverages_discussed.notes: Schedule includes building, contents, business income, and total insured values by location.

positives: Portfolio consists primarily of fire resistive and masonry non-combustible construction.
Properties are concentrated in Texas with established commercial occupancies.
Several assets are relatively newer construction, including buildings from 2006, 2012, 2015, and 2018.
concerns: Portfolio includes mixed occupancies including office and mercantile exposures.
One listed modification references an added warehouse facility, but no corresponding location details are provided in the schedule.
One listed modification references a deleted old location, but no corresponding prior schedule details are provided here.
Values were updated per appraisal, indicating material year-over-year value changes.

extracted_text_sections.executive_summary: Property schedule reflects 8 Texas locations with a combined total insured value of 326384000. Modifications note an addition of a new warehouse facility, deletion of an old location due to lease expiration, and updated TIV per appraisal for Lone Star Property Holdings, LP, all effective 2026-03-15.
extracted_text_sections.operations_description: Commercial property portfolio including office, mercantile, mixed-use, and medical office buildings located in Dallas, Houston, Plano, Fort Worth, and Southlake, Texas.
